desc.en: Lisbon Metro is the subway system of Lisbon, the capital of Portugal. It is operated by the Lisbon Regional Metro Company. There are four lines: Blue Line, Yellow Line, Green Line and Red Line, with a total length of 43.2 kilometres, 52 stations and a maximum operating speed of 72 kilometres per hour. The system supports top-up tickets, day tickets and contactless payment, and the ticket service covers multiple sites. The Lisbon Metro has launched a new ML 24 series of cars.
desc.zh: 里斯本地铁是葡萄牙首都里斯本的地铁系统，由里斯本地区地铁公司运营，现有蓝线、黄线、绿线、红线4条线路，总长43.2公里，设52个车站，最高运行时速72公里。该系统支持充值票、天票及无接触支付，票务服务覆盖多个站点 。里斯本地铁推出了新的ML 24系列车厢。
